Document:
# Rule 2 — No Griefing
Do not intentionally ruin the round or another player's experience without a valid in-game reason.
Examples of griefing include but are not limited to: - Randomly attacking or killing players without roleplay justification - Sabotaging station systems with no antagonist objective to do so - Releasing viruses, flooding rooms, or destroying equipment for no reason - Stealing essential equipment from departments you have no reason to access
Griefing may result in a ban depending on severity and intent.
